untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of double-bottom pattern formation and yearly trading range position (high vs mid vs low), which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and operators. Pattern detection and yearly range percentile calculations require multi-bar pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed operator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Donchian breakout (proxy for pattern breakout) and pivot level (proxy for confirmation level). However, the core requirement—detecting double-bottom formations and measuring position within yearly range—requires pattern recognition beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons. The 50%+ throwback rate and ~10-day completion window are captured in hold_days_max and exit logic, but the pattern itself cannot be validated with available indicators.
